name: Weights & Biases
description: ML experiment tracking and model management. Monitor project access and team collaboration.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to wandb.ai
2. Click your avatar in the top right, then 'User Settings'
3. Scroll to 'API Keys' and click 'Create new API key'
4. Copy the API key and paste it below

checks.name: Weights & Biases App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the W&B API is accessible.
